other_observers: Paul Neldner; CFO members on a field trip two days prior saw the male at this same location
specific_location: N 37 deg. 09 ' 32"410', W 104 deg. 36' 10"W. 8/10s of a mile west of mile marker 65, St. Hwy 12
description: Dusky auriculars with dark bill. Very bright red-orange. Approx. 8". Grayish back.Behaviors: Bird responded to call. Flew in about to about 20 ft. away from us then retreated to Ponderosa Pine where it continued to call.Call: Slower than Robin with distinct pauses.Plumage: Adult
photographer: Photographer: Polly Wren Neldner, Polly Wren Neldner
